item.title: XTM and Vistatec launch enterprise AI content globalisation partnership
item.description: XTM and Vistatec today announced the launch of an enterprise AI globalisation partnership. The partnership is designed to help organisations operationalise AI-driven global content as a production capability, with the governance, auditability, and expert delivery required to scale. Continue Reading

item.title: An Open Letter to the Talents Who Make Our Industry Human
item.description: Today, we’re launching Talent Spotlight by Creative Words — a platform designed to match skilled professionals who are available for work, especially those impacted by layoffs, with companies looking for in-house talent in our ever-expanding localization ecosystem. Continue Reading

item.title: The GALA Barometer: Economic Indicators Why Your Participation Matters
item.description: The GALA Barometer is a comprehensive industry survey designed to give organizations in the global language industry clear, actionable insights into how their business compares to the market. Take Survey Why the Barometer: Economic Indicators Is Important Language service companies and... Continue Reading

item.title: Welo Data Wins Best Cyber Security Innovation at the Global Business Tech Awards
item.description: Welo Data, the multilingual data and evaluation partner for foundation labs and enterprises deploying generative AI systems globally, today announced that its Network Identity Management and Operations (NIMO) platform has won Best Cyber Security Innovation at the Global Business Tech Awards 2026. Continue Reading

item.title: Transifex rolls out major platform evolution to solve AI quality and control
item.description: XTM has just announced a major platform update in its Transifex product that’s designed to help organizations actively manage translation quality, govern AI output, and accelerate localisation with less operational friction. Continue Reading

item.title: XTM unveils XTM Agent to bring agentic AI into enterprise localisation workflows
item.description: XTM’s conversational AI agent transforms how teams navigate localisation workflows, with core capabilities now available for free across all XTM Cloud plans Continue Reading

item.title: Introducing TranslationOS, an Adaptive AI Service Delivery Platform
item.description: Translated introduces TranslationOS, an adaptive AI service delivery platform that helps enterprises manage the growing complexity of localization workflows and unlock latent demand for translation at scale. Continue Reading

item.title: Alconost Announces Public Availability of the MQM Tool API
item.description: New API enables programmatic project setup, linguist coordination, progress tracking, and structured export — while keeping all linguistic evaluation fully human-performed Continue Reading

item.title: Win & Winnow is seeking a Sales Representative (B2B) in Spain
item.description: Help more organizations improve lives through accessible information by opening doors, building trust early, and converting qualified interest into lasting relationships. This role is ideal for a consultative B2B seller who enjoys solution-based sales in services or tech environments. Continue Reading

item.title: Welocalize Expands Enterprise Access to OPAL Enable Through Blackbird Integration
item.description: New activation pathway allows Blackbird customers to seamlessly deploy customizable multilingual AI workflows inside existing orchestration environment. Continue Reading

item.title: Stay ahead of the curve in the language industry with the ZHAW
item.description: In 2026, you can look forward to eight online sessions held by experts covering hot topics in the language services industry, including the latest advancements in the area of AI, consultancy skills for language professionals and how you can incorporate cutting-edge tools to boost your productivity. Continue Reading

item.title: Digitaldrop and Adept Complete Merger to Accelerate "Borderless Digital Shift" in Global Marketing
item.description: We are pleased to announce that Digitaldrop Inc, and Adept Corporation have integrated our management resources to strengthen our business foundation and expand our service capabilities. We have re-started operations as the new “Digitaldrop Inc,". Continue Reading
